create.description:
Creates a toast notification programmatically and adds it to the stack. Returns a reference to the created toast
item element.

duration.description:
The length of time in milliseconds before the toast item is automatically dismissed. Set to 0 to keep the toast
item open until the user dismisses it.

with-icon.description:
Only required for SSR. Set to `true` if you're slotting in an `icon` element so the server-rendered markup
includes the icon before the component hydrates on the client.

wa-after-hide.description: Emitted after the toast item has finished hiding.

wa-after-show.description: Emitted after the toast item has finished showing.

wa-hide.description: Emitted when the toast item begins to hide.

wa-show.description: Emitted when the toast item begins to show.

slots.(default): The toast item's message content.
slots.icon: An optional icon to show at the start of the toast item.

hide.description: Hides the toast item with animation and removes it from the DOM.

disabled.description: Disables the tooltip so it won't show when triggered.

distance.description: The distance in pixels from which to offset the tooltip away from its target.

hide-delay.description: The amount of time to wait before hiding the tooltip when the user mouses out.

open.description: Indicates whether or not the tooltip is open. You can use this in lieu of the show/hide methods.

placement.description:
The preferred placement of the tooltip. Note that the actual placement may vary as needed to keep the tooltip
inside of the viewport.

show-delay.description: The amount of time to wait before showing the tooltip when the user mouses in.

skidding.description: The distance in pixels from which to offset the tooltip along its target.

trigger.description:
Controls how the tooltip is activated. Possible options include `click`, `hover`, `focus`, and `manual`. Multiple
options can be passed by separating them with a space. When manual is used, the tooltip must be activated
programmatically.

without-arrow.description: Removes the arrow from the tooltip.

wa-after-hide.description: Emitted after the tooltip has hidden and all animations are complete.

wa-after-show.description: Emitted after the tooltip has shown and all animations are complete.

wa-hide.description: Emitted when the tooltip begins to hide.

wa-show.description: Emitted when the tooltip begins to show.

slots.(default): The tooltip's default slot where any content should live. Interactive content should be avoided.

selection.description:
The selection behavior of the tree. Single selection allows only one node to be selected at a time. Multiple
displays checkboxes and allows more than one node to be selected. Leaf allows only leaf nodes to be selected.
Leaf-multiple allows multiple leaf nodes to be selected while parent nodes only expand and collapse.

wa-selection-change.description: Emitted when a tree item is selected or deselected.

slots.(default): The default slot.
slots.collapse-icon: The icon to show when the tree item is collapsed. Works best with `<wa-icon>`.
slots.expand-icon: The icon to show when the tree item is expanded. Works best with `<wa-icon>`.

selected.description: Draws the tree item in a selected state.

wa-after-collapse.description: Emitted after the tree item collapses and all animations are complete.

wa-after-expand.description: Emitted after the tree item expands and all animations are complete.

wa-collapse.description: Emitted when the tree item collapses.

wa-expand.description: Emitted when the tree item expands.

wa-lazy-change.description: Emitted when the tree item's lazy state changes.

wa-lazy-load.description: Emitted when a lazy item is selected. Use this event to asynchronously load data and append items to the tree before expanding. After appending new items, remove the `lazy` attribute to remove the loading state and update the tree.

slots.(default): The default slot.
slots.collapse-icon: The icon to show when the tree item is collapsed.
slots.expand-icon: The icon to show when the tree item is expanded.

getChildrenItems.signature: getChildrenItems({ includeDisabled = true }: { includeDisabled?: boolean } = {}) => WaTreeItem[]
getChildrenItems.description: Gets all the nested tree items in this node.

autoplay.description: Enables autoplay when the component connects.

autoplay-muted.description: Enables autoplay in a muted state.

autoplay-on-visible.description: Automatically resumes playback when the player scrolls back into view after being paused by scrolling out.

controls.description:
The video's controls preset.
- `none` — no controls are shown.
- `standard` — shows the timeline, play/pause, volume, captions, and fullscreen.
- `full` — all of the above plus playback speed and picture-in-picture.

currentTime.description: The current playback position in seconds.

duration.description: The total duration of the video in seconds.

icon-library.description: Icon library used for all built-in control icons. Defaults to 'system'.

loop.description: Loops the video when playback ends.

muted.description: When set, the video will be muted.

playing.description: Indicates whether the video is currently playing.

preload.description: Controls how the browser preloads the video. Defaults to 'metadata' to minimize data usage.

src.description: The URL of the video source. For multiple formats, use `<source>` elements instead.

thumbnails.description: A URL pointing to a WebVTT file for timeline thumbnail previews.

error.description: Emitted when an error occurs while loading/playing.

loadedmetadata.description: Emitted when metadata has been loaded.

slots.(default): The default slot. Place `<source>` and `<track>` elements for a single video. Alternatively, use the `src` attribute for a single source.
slots.controls-after-play: Content inserted immediately after the play/pause button. Used by `<wa-video-playlist>` to inject the next button.
slots.controls-start: Content inserted at the start of the controls bar (before play/pause). Used by `<wa-video-playlist>` to inject the prev button.
slots.exit-fullscreen-icon: Icon shown on the fullscreen button when in fullscreen.
slots.fullscreen-icon: Icon shown on the fullscreen button when not in fullscreen.
slots.mute-icon: Icon shown on the volume/mute button when muted or volume is 0.
slots.pause-icon: Icon shown on the play/pause button when playing.
slots.play-icon: Icon shown on the play/pause button when paused.
slots.poster-icon: Icon shown on the poster play button. Defaults to a play-circle icon.
slots.volume-icon: Icon shown on the volume/mute button when audio is active.

seek.description: Seeks to a specific time in the video.

controls.description: The controls preset forwarded to each child `<wa-video>`.

icon-library.description: Icon library used for placeholder icons.

wa-video-change.description: Emitted when the active video changes.

slots.(default): The default slot. Place `<wa-video>` elements to create a playlist.

goTo.description: Jumps to the video at the given index.

next.description: Plays the next video in the playlist.

previous.description: Plays the previous video in the playlist.

src.description: The URL of the content to display.

with-theme-sync.description: Enables automatic theme syncing (light/dark mode and theme selector classes) from the host document to the iframe.

zoom.description: The current zoom of the frame, e.g. 0 = 0% and 1 = 100%.

zoom-levels.description: The zoom levels to step through when using zoom controls. This does not restrict programmatic changes to the zoom.

error.description: Emitted from the internal iframe when it fails to load.

load.description: Emitted when the internal iframe when it finishes loading.

slots.zoom-in-icon: The slot that contains the zoom in icon.
slots.zoom-out-icon: The slot that contains the zoom out icon.

zoomIn.description: Zooms in to the next available zoom level.

zoomOut.description: Zooms out to the previous available zoom level.
